title: verbascum obtusifolium
intro: Verbascum obtusifolium, also known as Mullein, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its large, ovate leaves and tall spikes of yellow flowers. The plant's leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Mullein include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Mullein can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
